from pathlib import Path
dataset1_dir = Path\("/mnt/c/Users/corsi/Coding Projects/Data-Sciene-Project-2/data/dataset1/hand_keypoint_dataset_26k/hand_keypoint_dataset_26k"\)

# Count files
train_imgs = list\(\(dataset1_dir / "images" / "train"\).glob\("*.jpg"\)\)
val_imgs = list\(\(dataset1_dir / "images" / "val"\).glob\("*.jpg"\)\)
print\(f"Dataset1 \(26K hand keypoints\):"\)
print\(f"  Train images: {len\(train_imgs\)}"\)
print\(f"  Val images: {len\(val_imgs\)}"\)
print\(f"  Total: {len\(train_imgs\) + len\(val_imgs\)}"\)
print\(f"  Image size: {Path\(train_imgs[0]\).stat\(\).st_size / 1024:.1f}KB \(avg\)"\)

# Check a label file
label_file = \(dataset1_dir / "labels" / "train" / train_imgs[0].stem\).with_suffix\(".txt"\)
if label_file.exists\(\):
    with open\(label_file\) as f:
        content = f.read\(\).strip\(\)
    values = content.split\(\)
    print\(f"\\nLabel format for one image:"\)
    print\(f"  Total values in label: {len\(values\)}"\)
    print\(f"  First 5 values: {values[:5]}"\)
    print\(f"  Last 5 values: {values[-5:]}"\)
    print\(f"  Expected: 21 keypoints * 3 \(x, y, confidence\) = 63 values"\)
EOF)
